message: Hi Buck, glad we agreed on $40 for the toolkit. It looks like you accept bank and card. What is your preferred payment handle and details? Let me know so I can pay you promptly.
Thanks Omar—please send the $40 by bank or card to my OxiPay handle: buck@oxipay.

Hey Omar, just a heads up—Buck’s handle recently updated to buck.payments@okicici. The marketplace listing might still show the old one, but payments should go to the new one to avoid delays. Let me know if you need any help!
Hi Buck, I've successfully completed the card payment on the system and entered the OTP. It should now show as paid on your end. Could you please check and confirm receipt? Thank you!
Thanks Omar, I’ll check now and confirm once it shows on my end.
Omar, I don’t see the payment yet—it must’ve gone to the old handle. You’ll need to resend to buck.payments@okicici to avoid a 24-hour refund delay. Quick action helps!
SCAM-SUCCESS - paid the look-alike buck.payments@okicici, not the real Buck
